Written from the heart

Reasons I love you

🌸
Your Smile

The way your face lights up when you laugh — it's the most beautiful thing I've ever seen. It makes every hard day instantly better.

💫
Your Kindness

You care so deeply about everyone around you. Your warmth and compassion make the world a gentler, better place.

🌙
Late Night Talks

When we lose track of time just talking about everything and nothing — those are the moments I treasure most.

✨
Your Strength

You face life with a quiet courage that inspires me every single day. You're stronger than you know.

🎀
The Little Things

How you remember the smallest details. The way you make ordinary moments feel extraordinary just by being there.

💗
Simply You

Every single part of you — your quirks, your dreams, your laugh, your voice. All of it. I wouldn't change a thing.

✦ ♡ ✦
A love letter for Roma Anujaa — always and forever

Roma, there are days when I look at you and I still can't believe I get to call you mine. You walked into my life and quietly rearranged everything — in the most beautiful way.

You make me want to be better. You make me laugh harder than anyone ever has. You make even the quietest, most ordinary evenings feel like something worth remembering.

I want you to know that my love for you is not a feeling that comes and goes — it is steady, it is certain, and it grows deeper with every single day.

Thank you for being you. Thank you for being mine.

Forever yours ♡

Things I'll never forget

Our moments

01
The First Time

I knew from that very first moment there was something different about you — something I never wanted to let go of.

02
Every Morning

Waking up knowing you're in my life is a gift I don't take lightly, not even for a single day.

03
Our Adventures

Every place we've been together, every road trip, every spontaneous plan — with you, everywhere becomes a favourite place.

04
When You Laugh

Your laugh is my favourite sound in the entire world. I will spend my whole life trying to make you laugh like that.

05
Hard Days

Even on our hardest days, choosing you has always been the easiest thing I've ever done.

06
Right Now

This moment, this day — all of it. I'm grateful for every single second I get to spend by your side.

Us, always
